description: CourtListener search doesn't match common legal abbreviations in case names

examples.search_term: Busha v. SC Dep't of Mental Health
examples.expected: Should match 'Busha v. SC Department of Mental Health'

flp_notes: Issue #3089 added some abbreviations to Elasticsearch (Apr 2023). Issue #3367 requests full Indigo Book table. Unclear if API search uses same index as web search.
our_workaround: Parser normalizes abbreviations before search: Cnty.->County, Dep't->Department, Corp.->Corporation, etc. See parser.py _normalize_case_name()
upstream_fix_needed: Add full Indigo Book abbreviation table to Elasticsearch synonyms. See https://law.resource.org/pub/us/code/blue/indigobook-2.0-beta.html#t11

description: RECAP search API 'docket' parameter appears to be ignored, returns unfiltered recent results

examples.actual: Returns recent RECAP results unrelated to docket number

flp_notes: Not yet reported to FLP. Needs confirmation with test cases.
our_workaround: Use 'q' parameter with quoted docket number instead: q='"C15-1228"'. Then filter results client-side to matching dockets. See client.py search_recap() and verifier.py docket number search.
upstream_fix_needed: Fix docket parameter to actually filter results, or document that it doesn't work

description: Case names in CL database don't always match how they're cited in opinions

examples.notes: Multi-party case, CL uses different defendant
Multi-defendant case, different defendant used in caption

flp_notes: This may be expected behavior for multi-party cases. CL picks primary defendant, citations may reference different party.
our_workaround: Docket number search bypasses name matching. Also uses fuzzy name matching with defendant comparison for 'State v.' style cases.
upstream_fix_needed: Consider indexing all party names for search, not just primary caption. Or document this limitation.

description: Some cases exist in CL but have empty 'citations' field, making citation lookup fail
flp_notes: Need to collect specific cluster IDs to report
our_workaround: Fall back to opinion/RECAP search when citation lookup returns nothing
upstream_fix_needed: Backfill citations for existing cases, improve citation extraction from documents
test_coverage: Would need to add cases that fail citation lookup but exist in search

description: State court coverage is incomplete, some opinions not indexed for search
flp_notes: This is a known limitation documented in CL. State court data is harder to obtain than federal.
our_workaround: None - we can only verify what CL has
upstream_fix_needed: Ongoing data acquisition effort by FLP
test_coverage: None - can't test against data CL doesn't have
